## 变更类型 / Change Type

<!-- 勾选适用项 / Check all that apply -->

- [ ] Bug fix（不影响现有功能）/ Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] 新功能 / New feature
- [ ] Breaking change（删除或修改现有接口）/ Breaking change (removes or changes existing API)
- [ ] 文档 / Documentation
- [ ] 测试 / Tests
- [ ] 代码重构 / Refactoring

## 测试 / Testing

<!-- 描述你如何测试了本次变更 -->
<!-- Describe how you tested these changes -->

- [ ] 已运行 `make test`（覆盖率 > 80%）/ Ran `make test` (coverage > 80%)
- [ ] 已运行 `make lint`（ruff + mypy 无报错）/ Ran `make lint` (ruff + mypy clean)

## CHANGELOG

- [ ] 已在 `CHANGELOG.md` 的 `[Unreleased]` 区段添加条目 / Added entry to `[Unreleased]` section in `CHANGELOG.md`
